title: Roaring Knight Black Knife
description: A mod that adds the power of the roaring fraud from Deltarune!!!
body: The Black Knife is a multi‑mode legendary blade — press R/G to cycle moves (the active move is shown in the tooltip) and right‑click to perform the selected ability; hold Shift and right‑click to begin charging Swoon Attack. While held in your main hand it raises your max HP to 40, continuously refreshes Regeneration III, Speed II and Haste V, and grants +10 extra weapon damage; there’s also a 30% reactive slash chance that spawns a retaliatory blade when you’re hit. Available moves: Black Swords summons five swords that sequentially lunge and actively follow the target; Board Rend fires five timed forward shots over ~2 seconds that explode into left/right shard sprays (with a ~30% chance of a full 360° burst); Knife Hallway fires five quick bursts; Circling Knives are very fast orbiting blades that slash rapidly on touch; Sanguine Slash shoots one arrow then a series of slashes that accelerate; Final STARS spawns stars in a 7–10 block ring that slowly pull inward, then briefly push outward and explode into non‑homing shards (touching stars hurts). The new Parry move is selectable—right‑click to activate a 1‑second reflect window that negates damage and turns incoming projectiles into homing counter shards; note Swoon charging is interrupted if you’re hit while charging.
